name: hexagonal
description: Hexagonal (Ports & Adapters): ports in domain, adapters in infra, no framework leakage into core.

rules.guidance: Inbound and outbound ports (interfaces) are defined inside the application core. No framework types in port signatures — only domain objects and stdlib primitives.
Adapters (HTTP controllers, DB repositories, message consumers) live outside the core and implement/use port interfaces. Each adapter has a single responsibility.
The application core must not import Spring/Express/Django/Rails or any ORM. Framework annotations are adapter concerns only.
Test the core with fake/stub port implementations, not real adapters. Core tests run without a database or HTTP server.
